description: REV17 Stage-F structural fixtures (rev 4: F1-F5 + G1-G3 + H1-H4) — the canonical SHAPES + frozen contracts the gates require Stage-P production to emit. Frozen; Stage P implements production to satisfy them.

canonical_truth_record.description: H1: the gate VALIDATES the canonical truth set strictly and NON-COERCINGLY before any rendered comparison. Identity is the COMPOSITE (hand_id, ledger_index). Input is a LIST of complete records (a dict is rejected).
strict_rules: ledger_index is an EXACT non-negative int (a float like 20.9 or a string fails — no truncation)
physical_bb / live_total_bb / uncalled_return_bb are FINITE numbers (NaN / Infinity fail)
the dict-key inference is removed — every required field, including ledger_index, must be explicit

independent_source_expected_coverage.description: H1: the gate is invoked with expected_sized_action_keys — the set of (hand_id, ledger_index) the SOURCE/action ledger inventory says are sized actions, derived INDEPENDENTLY of the canonical replay under test. It is MANDATORY; None / omitted FAILS.
independent_source_expected_coverage.report_runs: for June-16 + holdout, a missing or empty expected-source inventory FAILS (an empty set is only valid if independently proven empty).

row_bound_rendered_action_element.description: every sized grid-action row carries the FULL machine-readable identity; sized-ness comes from the canonical record + the structural marker, never visible English.
row_bound_rendered_action_element.rendered_input: the gate runs against the SHIPPED HTML string; a synthetic pre-parsed list is rejected (synthetic evidence cannot stand in for the DOM).
row_bound_rendered_action_element.example_canonical_row: BTN 18.1BB all-in

primary_visible_display.description: H2: each sized row contains EXACTLY ONE non-hidden element marked data-sizing-role="primary" whose parsed amount equals the action-required field. A second value uses data-sizing-role="secondary".
primary_visible_display.display_grammar: visible amount is integer OR decimal (\d+(?:\.\d+)?BB)
fails_if: the correct number only in a hidden / tooltip / unrelated child
primary_visible_display.stage_p_note: Stage P additionally runs a browser/DOM computed-visibility acceptance over the actual rendered DOM; this static gate freezes marker cardinality + text + static-hidden.

dead_blind_structural_fixture.description: H3: the gate is invoked with expected_dead_blind_keys — the stable idx identities the SOURCE inventory says are dead blinds, derived independently of the replay output. MANDATORY (None fails, even for an empty set). The replay dead-blind idx set must EQUAL the expected set (identity, not count).

recon.current_bug: dead_blind in the live-post tuple at replay_full_history + oracle

dead_blind_structural_fixture.scan_not_filter: any record declaring post_type==dead_blind is checked; a wrong/missing action FAILS as malformed (not filtered away).
dead_blind_structural_fixture.pilot_empty_proof: because the pilot corpus has 0 dead blinds, Stage P must ship the independent source-scan evidence that the expected key set is genuinely empty; a default None or unproved empty list is insufficient.
